narrative: Bullish run in Nimbus Cloud (SEC-3002), Quartzite Semi (SEC-3003), Zenith Robotics (SEC-3005), and Telara Networks (SEC-3008). Pasternak initiations and upgrades, multiple hedge funds (Hyperion, Tradewinds, Forge Hill, Sable, Heliotrope) accumulating; ETF and dark-pool prints tracking with order flow. Inventory is short / axed to buy across the basket.

Negative news flow on Meridian Pacific Bancorp drives a downgrade on the MPBN27 bond and broad sell intent from insurance (Atlas Mutual, Aegis Life) and pension clients (Cascadia, Meridian State, Ironclad). Bank holds a $22mm long inventory overhang in MPBN27 with wide bid/offer; multiple RFQs and inquiries on the line.

Hot CPI print and heavy refunding announcement push the long end of the curve weaker. Sirocco Macro Fund is an active seller of UST 10y; pension clients (Cascadia, Meridian State, Ironclad, Saltmarsh) trim UST 30y exposure. Idris Vance research reinforces the underweight long-end view.

Press report sparks accumulation in NAES28 (SEC-3101) and Brightgate equity / bonds. Hyperion, Sirocco, Halcyon, and Tradewinds build positions; Vehring upgrades NAES28 and initiates BRGT at Buy. Multiple inquiries seek natural sellers in NAES28.

Hyperion Capital (CL-2001) runs a staged accumulation in Karmania Sovereign 2032 (SEC-3501) over the 90-day window, supported by IMF staff-level news and a Chowdhry upgrade. Holdings show an overweight position; bank inventory is short / axed to buy.

theme: Insurance ESG Demand for Solterra Green Bond
narrative: Atlas Mutual, Granite Reinsurance, Aegis Life, and Saltmarsh Pension are active buyers of Solterra Renewables Green 4.10% 2035 (SEC-3110). ESG mandate ramps in CRM notes; Vehring reiterates a constructive spread view; bank is long the bond and axed to sell.

Velder Industries miss and Veridate Auto profit warning, combined with softer China PMI, drive selling pressure in VLDR, Veridate, and the Bluemetal Mining ETF. EMEA asset managers (Northwind, Lumen) and APAC (Bluefin) lead the de-risking. Quinlan downgrades VLDR and the EU OEM complex.
